description: Ketubba fragment. Bride: Sitt al-Majd. Decorated with thin red geometric designs/frames. On verso there is a related legal document dated Sivan 1556 Seleucid, which is 1245 CE. Goitein summarizes, "When he inherited from his father 1/2 house she asked him to give it to her against [...]. He had no further obligation from dowry or delayed marriage payment." (See Goitein's index card for further information.)
description_he: שבר כתובה; הכלה: סתת אל-מג'ד; קישוט בעיצובים גיאומטריים אדומים; גב: מסמך משפטי קשור מסיוון 1556 שטרות = 1245 לספירה
